# vidframes

vidframes is a small TypeScript CLI/library for cost-aware video analysis with Cloudflare Workers AI.

Site: https://vidframes.coey.dev/
Source: https://github.com/acoyfellow/vidframes

Core pages:
- https://vidframes.coey.dev/ — overview, proof clip, API example, Deploy to Cloudflare button
- https://vidframes.coey.dev/architecture — module layout and design decisions
- https://vidframes.coey.dev/costs — frame-count and API-call cost model

Main mechanism:
1. Extract frames locally with ffmpeg.
2. Resize frames before uploading to a vision model.
3. Transcribe audio with Workers AI Whisper.
4. In smart mode, ask a text model which transcript timestamps need visual context.
5. Send only selected frames to the vision model.

Install from GitHub:
```bash
bun add github:acoyfellow/vidframes
```

Import:
```ts
import { smartAnalyze } from '@acoyfellow/vidframes';
```
